enchantment.excavate.excavation.desc.1: Affects a 3x3 area. Crouch for single blocks. Works on mining, crop harvesting, tilling, pathing, and stripping.
enchantment.excavate.excavation.desc.2: Affects a 5x5 area. Crouch for single blocks. Works on mining, crop harvesting, tilling, pathing, and stripping.
